Package main.services

Class AutoCryptService

java.lang.Object
main.services.Service
main.services.AutoCryptService
All Implemented Interfaces:
IStatusProvider, ICSLService
public class AutoCryptService extends Service implements IStatusProvider
OCSP : Online Certificate Status Protocol Role : Path : Issuer :
